target: 2. Hoine's Guide to Hitogashima Island
Heeeey, Sis!
Hizuru-chan, welcome back~!!
You're five minutes late for our meeting.
Sorry, I suddenly had to go to the bathroom right as I was heading out. But I hurried here as fast as I could, you know?
I see. That was a pointless effort.
Huh...?
I mean that it would have been fine if you arrived a little later.
Because it's exactly this kind of seemingly wasted time that is precious time for a novelist to construct ideas.
Hizuru-chan!
Hm... Ah, Hoine.
Hizuru-chan! When someone says "welcome back", what are you supposed to say?
…I'm home.

Hehe.
Welcome back, Hizuru-chan.
And Ryunosuke.
Here is what you requested. Take it home with gratitude.
Whoa, whoa...!?
Are these souvenirs? You bought all this for me!?
Stop playing dumb... You're the one who demanded I buy them.
No no, I never told you to buy them! I just said I'd be happy if there were souvenirs.
Yeah, right. If I hadn't bought anything and come home, you would have complained.
The fact that you still properly bought them even while complaining like that is so like you, Sis.
Thanks. Come on, Hoine, you say thanks too.

Thank you~!
I love Hizuru-chan~!
No need for thanks, Hoine.
So, what are you doing after this? It's been a while since you came back, so you're going to relax at home, right?
No, I don't have the time for that. I told you, I'm preparing for my new work and came back to do research as well.
Ah, so that's why you're so on edge.
...That's not the only reason, though.
Huh? Did something happen?
You haven't been leaking information about me to the people around you, have you?
Information about you...? You mean about "Ryunosuke Nagumo"?
No way, I haven't told anyone!
...Then that's fine.
(He doesn't seem to be hiding anything. Which means Ryunosuke is innocent... Where did that boy get his information from?)
Hizuru-chan~! Let's play~!
I'd love to play with you, but I have research to do.
C'mon~, let's play~!
Pushing her demands until she gets her way... She truly is a child.
Exactly, Hoine is still a kid at the age where she wants to play. So, y'know?
You should at least indulge your cute niece's selfishness a little.
I want to play with Hizuru-chan!
...I came here to work. I didn't come back to play with you, Hoine.
Even just a little bit is fine, so couldn't you give her some attention?
Hoine was really looking forward to you coming back, Sis.
Yeah! I was waiting!
If you want to play, play with Ryunosuke--
Not Papa! I want to play with Hizuru-chan!
A-Ahaha...
Sooo~, c'mon! Let's play, Hizuru-chan!
I'll explain it one more time, so listen carefully. I came to the island to work.

Yeah!
So let's play!
...Your use of "so" is incorrect. This is why children's thinking is so incomprehensible.
Then, what about after work? You'll have a little bit of time, right?
Hizuru-chan, when will your work end?
Even I don't know. So give up and go home.
No! I'm staying with Hizuru-chan! That way, we can play as soon as your work is done, right!?
...My work is something I do alone. Having someone by my side distracts me.
What is your job, Hizuru-chan? I'll help you out!
Listen to what people are saying...
Sis, you're going to do research now, right? Hoine, Sis has to walk around the island after this.
Ah! If that's the case, I'll be your guide to the island!
Unnecessary. I was born on this island, you know?
Well, even so, this island has changed a bit too.
There are quite a few places that aren't the same as when you were here, so wouldn't having a guide be convenient in many ways?
I can't deny that, but...
Hear that, Hoine! Do your best as the island guide!
Yeah!
Hey, I haven't agreed to having a guide yet--

Come on, Hizuru-chan!
Let's go already!
*Sigh*...
(I really am bad with children. Their words and actions are too unpredictable to handle.)
Ryunosuke. You spoil Hoine too much.
Huh? Does it look that way?
If this keeps up, she'll grow up mistakenly believing that if she's just stubborn enough, people will do whatever she says.
It's fine. It's not like Hoine is just being stubborn.
She's just acting spoiled because she's dealing with you, Sis.
Because it's me?
C'mooon~! I said let's gooo~!
(...Since it's come to this, letting her accomplish her goal quickly is the most efficient option.)
Understood. But before that, at least let me leave my luggage at the inn.
Yay! Alright then, let's gooo!
Hey, are you even listening?!?
